title: Sport & Fitness
description: Sporty, fitness a jak mluvit o soutěžích a zraněních.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.text: Did you watch the match last night?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.text: Yes! I can't believe we lost. The referee was terrible.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.text: That penalty in the last minute was so controversial.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.text: I know. Anyway, are you going to the gym later?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.text: I can't — I pulled a muscle running this morning.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.text: You should rest it for a few days and stretch properly next time.

examples.en: She beat her personal best by 3 seconds.
examples.cz: Překonala svůj osobní rekord o 3 sekundy.

examples.en: Always warm up before exercise to avoid injury.
examples.cz: Vždy se rozcvičte před cvičením, abyste se vyvarovali zranění.

examples.en: The team drew 2–2 after extra time.
He sprained his ankle during training.

quiz.sentence: She ___ her personal best in the 400m. (exceeded)
The game ended in a ___. Both teams scored once.
Always ___ up before you start running.
He had to ___ from a knee injury for 6 weeks.

tasks: 1. Describe your favourite sport — how it is played, how many players, equipment needed
2. Write about a memorable sporting event you watched or participated in
3. Write a training plan for one week using fitness vocabulary
